TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Aron Baynes hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Aron Baynes, biru na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya Aron Baynes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. t'aring sa kawas 2013, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. qyanux na sraral Baynes htgan na ryax maki Gisborne, New Zealand. aring cyugal kawas Baynes ga,hiya qutux cinngasal musa beh Mareeba, Queensland. pinqbaqan nya Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Mareeba State pqwsan biru seneng sa Mareeba, Queensland. Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Cairns State pqwsan biru seneng sa Cairns, Queensland. Aron Baynes, t'aring kawas tay 2005 tehuk kawas tay 2009, mqwas biru sa Washington State pqwsan biru krahu. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: aron βajnes~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, aron βajnes~ɕ, βiru na pʔunro. mintzjuwaw nja aron βajnes~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. qjanux na s~ɕraral βajnes~ɕ ħtɣan na rjax maki ɣis~ɕβorne, new zealan*. ariŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ βajnes~ɕ ɣa,ħija qutux ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa βeħ mareeβa, queens~ɕlan*. pinqβaqan nja aron βajnes~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa mareeβa s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa mareeβa, queens~ɕlan*. aron βajnes~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨairns~ɕ s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨairns~ɕ, queens~ɕlan*. aron βajnes~ɕ, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa was~ɕħiŋton s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Aron Baynes hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Aron Baynes, biru na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya Aron Baynes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. t'aring sa kawas 2013, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. qyanux na sraral Baynes htgan na ryax maki Gisborne, New Zealand. aring cyugal kawas Baynes ga,hiya qutux cinngasal musa beh Mareeba, Queensland. pinqbaqan nya Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Mareeba State pqwsan biru seneng sa Mareeba, Queensland. Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Cairns State pqwsan biru seneng sa Cairns, Queensland. Aron Baynes, t'aring kawas tay 2005 tehuk kawas tay 2009, mqwas biru sa Washington State pqwsan biru krahu. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: aron βajnes~ɕ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, aron βajnes~ɕ, βiru na pʔunro. mintzjuwaw nja aron βajnes~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. qjanux na s~ɕraral βajnes~ɕ ħtɣan na rjax maki ɣis~ɕβorne, new zealan*. ariŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kawas~ɕ βajnes~ɕ ɣa,ħija qutux ʦ~ʨinŋas~ɕal mus~ɕa βeħ mareeβa, queens~ɕlan*. pinqβaqan nja aron βajnes~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa mareeβa s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa mareeβa, queens~ɕlan*. aron βajnes~ɕ mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨairns~ɕ s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨairns~ɕ, queens~ɕlan*. aron βajnes~ɕ, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa was~ɕħiŋton s~ɕtate pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
